interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Who were inducted into the Hall of Fame and what are their full names?
interactions.intention: Get the names of players inducted into the Hall of Fame.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID WHERE HOF.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: For those players, can you tell me which awards they have received?
interactions.intention: Find the awards received by players inducted into the Hall of Fame.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, PA.AWARD_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD PA ON P.PLAYER_ID = PA.PLAYER_ID WHERE HOF.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which year were these awards given?
interactions.intention: Get the years in which awards were given to players inducted into the Hall of Fame.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, PA.AWARD_ID, PA.YEAR FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD PA ON P.PLAYER_ID = PA.PLAYER_ID WHERE HOF.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the salary of players who received points for the Cy Young award in 1956?
interactions.intention: Find the salary of players who received points for the Cy Young award in 1956.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE V JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON V.PLAYER_ID=S.PLAYER_ID AND V.YEAR=S.YEAR WHERE V.AWARD_ID='Cy Young' AND V.YEAR=1956

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which league were these players part of?
interactions.intention: Find the league of players who received points for the Cy Young award in 1956.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT V.LEAGUE_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE V JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON V.PLAYER_ID=S.PLAYER_ID AND V.YEAR=S.YEAR WHERE V.AWARD_ID='Cy Young' AND V.YEAR=1956

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the maximum number of points won by a player in that year?
interactions.intention: Find the maximum points won by a player in 1956 for the Cy Young award.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MAX(POINTS_WON) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE WHERE AWARD_ID='Cy Young' AND YEAR=1956

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me which players inducted into the Hall of Fame received award votes in the same year?
interactions.intention: Which players inducted into the Hall of Fame received award votes in the same year?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT HOF.PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE PAV ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = PAV.PLAYER_ID AND HOF.YEARID = PAV.YEAR

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many ballots were cast for these players?
interactions.intention: How many ballots were cast for the players inducted into the Hall of Fame who received award votes in the same year?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(HOF.BALLOTS) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And what were the maximum points won in the award votes by these players?
interactions.intention: What were the maximum points won in the award votes by the players inducted into the Hall of Fame who received award votes in the same year?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MAX(PAV.POINTS_WON) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE PAV JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = PAV.PLAYER_ID AND HOF.YEARID = PAV.YEAR

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the awards won by players inducted into the Hall of Fame?
interactions.intention: What awards were won by players inducted into the Hall of Fame?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.AWARD_ID, P.YEAR, P.LEAGUE_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD P ON H.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many votes did those inducted players receive?
interactions.intention: What are the number of votes received by the inducted players?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT H.PLAYER_ID, H.VOTES FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H WHERE H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What were their salaries in the years they were inducted?
interactions.intention: What were the salaries of the inducted players in the years they were inducted?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT S.PLAYER_ID, S.SALARY, S.YEAR FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON H.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.INDUCTED = 'Y' AND H.YEARID = S.YEAR

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the names of players who have won any awards and the details of those awards?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the names of players and details of awards they have won.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, A.AWARD_ID, A.YEAR FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P INNER JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD A ON P.PLAYER_ID = A.PLAYER_ID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the salaries and the years for these players?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the salaries and the years for the players mentioned earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, S.SALARY, S.YEAR FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P INNER JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON P.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you provide both the award details and salary information for these players together?
interactions.intention: Retrieve both the award details and the salary information for the players mentioned earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, A.AWARD_ID, A.YEAR AS AWARD_YEAR, S.SALARY, S.YEAR AS SALARY_YEAR FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P INNER JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD A ON P.PLAYER_ID = A.PLAYER_ID INNER JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON P.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Who were inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936?
interactions.intention: Find all players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE YEARID = 1936 AND INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the birth details of these players?
interactions.intention: Find the birth details of the players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.PLAYER_ID, P.BIRTH_YEAR, P.BIRTH_MONTH, P.BIRTH_DAY, P.BIRTH_COUNTRY, P.BIRTH_STATE, P.BIRTH_CITY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H INNER JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P ON H.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.YEARID = 1936 AND H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Did any of them receive award votes?
interactions.intention: Find out if the players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936 received award votes.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT A.PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H INNER JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE A ON H.PLAYER_ID = A.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.YEARID = 1936 AND H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the first and last name of players born in the USA?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the first and last names of players born in the USA.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME_FIRST, NAME_LAST FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER WHERE BIRTH_COUNTRY = 'USA'

interactions.utterance: Out of those players, who were born in Alabama?
interactions.intention: Find the players born in Alabama from the previously retrieved list.

interactions.utterance: Did any of these players win any awards?
interactions.intention: Check if players born in Alabama have won any awards.

interactions.utterance: How many players were inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936?
interactions.intention: How many players were inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE YEARID = 1936 AND INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.utterance: What are the names of those players?
interactions.intention: What are the names of the players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P ON H.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.YEARID = 1936 AND H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.intention: Find the players inducted into the Hall of Fame who have also won awards.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT HOF.PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD PA ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = PA.PLAYER_ID WHERE HOF.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.utterance: How many votes did they need to get inducted?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT HOF.YEARID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE PAV ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = PAV.PLAYER_ID WHERE HOF.INDUCTED = 'Y' AND HOF.YEARID = PAV.YEAR

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the salary details of players who have won awards?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.PLAYER_ID, S.SALARY, S.YEAR FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE V ON P.PLAYER_ID = V.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON P.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID

interactions.utterance: Out of those players, who is the heaviest?
interactions.intention: Who is the heaviest player among those who have won awards?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, P.WEIGHT FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P WHERE P.WEIGHT = (SELECT MAX(P1.WEIGHT) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P1)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And what is the birth country of that player?
interactions.intention: What is the birth country of the heaviest player who has won awards?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.BIRTH_COUNTRY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P WHERE P.WEIGHT = (SELECT MAX(P1.WEIGHT) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P1)

interactions.utterance: Which player received the most points for an award along with the year and league?
interactions.intention: Which player received the most points for an award along with the year and league?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT V.PLAYER_ID, V.POINTS_WON, V.YEAR, V.LEAGUE_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD A JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE V ON A.AWARD_ID = V.AWARD_ID AND A.YEAR = V.YEAR AND A.LEAGUE_ID = V.LEAGUE_ID ORDER BY V.POINTS_WON DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

interactions.utterance: Who got the highest number of first-place votes?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What was the salary of that player in the same year?
interactions.intention: What was the salary of the player with the highest number of first-place votes in the same year?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE V JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON V.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID AND V.YEAR = S.YEAR WHERE V.VOTES_FIRST = (SELECT MAX(VOTES_FIRST) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE)

interactions.utterance: How many votes were needed for induction in the first year of voting?
interactions.intention: Find the votes needed for induction during the first year of voting.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NEEDED FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE YEARID = (SELECT MIN(YEARID) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What awards were won by the inducted players from the USA?
interactions.intention: Find awards won by players inducted into the Hall of Fame who were born in the USA.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT A.AWARD_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P ON H.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD A ON P.PLAYER_ID = A.PLAYER_ID WHERE P.BIRTH_COUNTRY = 'USA' AND H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What awards were given in the year 1884?
interactions.intention: What awards were given in the year 1884?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT AWARD_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD WHERE YEAR = 1884

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Who received these awards and how many points did they win?
interactions.intention: Who received the awards from 1884 and how many points they won?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.PLAYER_ID, V.POINTS_WON FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE V ON P.AWARD_ID = V.AWARD_ID AND P.YEAR = V.YEAR WHERE P.YEAR = 1884

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What were the notes associated with these awards?
interactions.intention: What notes were associated with the awards from 1884?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NOTES FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD WHERE YEAR = 1884

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Who are the players inducted into the Hall of Fame and their birth details?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the list of players inducted into the Hall of Fame along with their birth details.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT HOF.PLAYER_ID, P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, P.BIRTH_YEAR, P.BIRTH_MONTH, P.BIRTH_DAY, P.BIRTH_COUNTRY, P.BIRTH_STATE, P.BIRTH_CITY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID WHERE HOF.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many votes did each of these players receive during their induction?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the number of votes received by each inducted player during their induction.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PLAYER_ID, VOTES FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which awards have these inducted players received and in what year?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the awards and years for the inducted players.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT HOF.PLAYER_ID, AWARD.AWARD_ID, AWARD.YEAR FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE AWARD ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = AWARD.PLAYER_ID WHERE HOF.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which players in the Hall of Fame also received player awards?
interactions.intention: Find players in the Hall of Fame who also received player awards.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT HOF.PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD PA ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = PA.PLAYER_ID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many votes did each of those players receive in the Hall of Fame voting?
interactions.intention: Find the number of votes received in the Hall of Fame voting for the players identified earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PLAYER_ID, VOTES FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What was the voting method used for these players?
interactions.intention: Find the voting method used for the players identified earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PLAYER_ID, VOTEDBY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Who are the players born in the USA?
interactions.intention: Find players who were born in the USA.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME_FIRST, NAME_LAST FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER WHERE BIRTH_COUNTRY = 'USA'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the awards won by these players?
interactions.intention: Find the awards won by the players filtered in the previous interaction.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, A.AWARD_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE A ON P.PLAYER_ID = A.PLAYER_ID WHERE P.BIRTH_COUNTRY = 'USA'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And what were their salaries?
interactions.intention: Find the salaries of the players filtered in the previous interactions.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON P.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID WHERE P.BIRTH_COUNTRY = 'USA'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which players received the most votes in the Hall of Fame voting?
interactions.intention: Which players got the highest number of votes in the Hall of Fame voting?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PLAYER_ID, VOTES FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME ORDER BY VOTES DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many ballots were cast for this voting process?
interactions.intention: What was the total number of ballots cast in the Hall of Fame voting?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(BALLOTS) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also show me the salary of those players in the same voting year?
interactions.intention: What were the salaries of the players in the same year they participated in the Hall of Fame voting?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT HOF.PLAYER_ID, HOF.YEARID, SAL.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY SAL ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = SAL.PLAYER_ID AND HOF.YEARID = SAL.YEAR
